name: ssh-tool
description: SSH multi-hop tool for AI agents - MCP support, daemon, file transfer, background exec

scripts.test: npm run build:test && node --test dist/__tests__/daemon.test.js dist/__tests__/session-manager.test.js dist/__tests__/profile-manager.test.js dist/__tests__/remote-shell.test.js dist/__tests__/remote-fs.test.js dist/__tests__/remote-tools.test.js dist/__tests__/connection.test.js dist/__tests__/gateway.test.js dist/__tests__/logger.test.js dist/__tests__/multi-hop-auth.test.js dist/__tests__/file-transfer.test.js dist/__tests__/background-exec.test.js dist/__tests__/port-forwarding.test.js dist/__tests__/error-handling.test.js dist/__tests__/mcp-server.test.js dist/__tests__/session-reuse.test.js dist/__tests__/daemon-ipc.test.js dist/__tests__/agent-auth.test.js
scripts.test:fast: npm run build:test && node --test dist/__tests__/profile-manager.test.js dist/__tests__/logger.test.js dist/__tests__/session-manager.test.js dist/__tests__/daemon-ipc.test.js dist/__tests__/mcp-profile-switch.test.js dist/__tests__/file-transfer-pipeline.test.js dist/__tests__/file-transfer-smart.test.js
scripts.test:ssh: npm run build:test && node --test dist/__tests__/daemon.test.js dist/__tests__/remote-shell.test.js dist/__tests__/remote-fs.test.js dist/__tests__/remote-tools.test.js dist/__tests__/connection.test.js dist/__tests__/gateway.test.js dist/__tests__/multi-hop-auth.test.js dist/__tests__/file-transfer.test.js dist/__tests__/background-exec.test.js dist/__tests__/port-forwarding.test.js dist/__tests__/error-handling.test.js dist/__tests__/mcp-server.test.js dist/__tests__/session-reuse.test.js dist/__tests__/agent-auth.test.js dist/__tests__/daemon-lifecycle.test.js dist/__tests__/performance.test.js dist/__tests__/integration.test.js
scripts.test:all: npm run build:test && npm run test:fast && npm run test:ssh && npm run test:integration && npm run test:performance
